subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance which God hath sent down unto him who hath laid hold on the cord of divine knowledge and turned unto Him when the servants turned away. Verily, We have heard [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر انزله الله لمن تمسک بحبل العرفان و اقبل الیه اذ اعرض عنه العباد انا سمعنا
